policies.name: Returns
policies.summary: Unused gear can be returned within 30 days with the receipt.
details: Items must be clean, undamaged, and include original packaging when available.
Refunds return to the original payment method in the demo policy.

policies.name: Fit exchanges
policies.summary: Worn performance footwear can be exchanged within 14 days when the issue is fit-related.
details: Fit exchanges apply to size, width, heel slip, or toe-box comfort issues.
The demo policy does not include medical guarantees or injury claims.

limitations: No live promotions, payment status, or order status are available.
No medical or injury outcome claims are available.
